case_title: NITA E. VELARDE et al VS. TRINITY APARTMENTS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-21-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-21-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. THE COURT ACCEPTS PLAINTIFFS FAXED COPY OF PROOF OF SERVICE, BUT ADVISES PLAINTIFFS THAT HER ATTORNEY MUST SEND IN THE ORIGINAL COPY TO THE COURT FOR FILING. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,600.00 FILED BY VELARDE, NITA E. GARCIA, JOSE R. AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY APARTMENTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-21-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-21-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VELARDE, NITA E. GARCIA, JOSE R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRINITY APARTMENTS $865.67 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $915.67 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
